task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL. For example, 'https://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com' should return 'us-west-2'.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs. Valid instance IDs start with 'i-' followed by exactly 17 hexadecimal characters (e.g., 'i-0a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8').
